mapper.insert: INSERT INTO comments ( board_id, member_id, parent_id, content ) VALUES ( #{boardId}, #{memberId}, #{request.parentId}, #{request.content} )
mapper.select: SELECT c.id, c.board_id, c.member_id, c.parent_id, c.content, m.nickname AS writer, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.deleted_at FROM comments c JOIN members m ON c.member_id = m.id WHERE c.board_id = #{boardId} ORDER BY COALESCE(c.parent_id, c.id) ASC, c.parent_id NULLS FIRST, c.created_at ASC, c.id ASC
SELECT c.id, c.board_id, c.member_id, c.parent_id, c.content, m.nickname AS writer, c.created_at, c.updated_at, c.deleted_at FROM comments c JOIN members m ON c.member_id = m.id WHERE c.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE comments SET content = #{request.content}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
UPDATE comments SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
